meaning: adj.已获得的,已成习惯的,后天通过自己的努力得到的
examples: Had he succeeded, he would have acquired a monopoly.
Abstract art is an acquired taste.
I've never acquired a taste for wine.
Likewise, developer Rare, after being acquired by Microsoft, has fired only blanks for the Xbox.
The concept of World Heritage has acquired great importance and is widely used today.
